Total Search Visibility Report

The Francie Malina Team | Compass
February 2026 | Report Date: March 1, 2026

Strategic Finding

0 → 109
The Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua: From Zero to #1 Content Asset in One Month

The Chappaqua guide, published in February 2026, immediately became the #1 trending content on franciemalina.com — generating 109 new GSC clicks, 118 organic sessions, and ranking for 50+ new Chappaqua queries that previously had zero visibility. It is now the #3 landing page on the entire site, behind only the homepage and property search.

Cumulative Growth: Total Search (Dec 2025 → Feb 2026)

Since launching Total Search optimization on December 23, 2025, franciemalina.com has seen sustained, compounding growth across every metric.

Up from 235 pre-launch (+125%)

Executive Summary: February 2026

February marks the second full month of Total Search optimization. The headline: the Chappaqua guide is a breakout success, instantly replicating the Scarsdale playbook. Meanwhile, Scarsdale content continues its upward trajectory. Every core metric improved month-over-month, with total impressions up 34%, clicks up 24%, and average position improving to 7.1.

#3
Landing Page on the Entire Site — In Its First Month

"The Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua, NY | Everything You Need to Know" went from non-existent to the third most-visited landing page on franciemalina.com, trailing only the property search tool and homepage. This validates the Total Search content strategy: comprehensive, locally-optimized guides drive sustained organic traffic.

Google Search Console: February vs. January 2026

Month-Over-Month Growth Continues

Every core metric improved for the second consecutive month since launching Total Search. Impressions grew 34%, clicks grew 24%, and average position improved by 0.6 positions.

Metric February 2026 January 2026 Change
Total Impressions 43,400 32,400 +33.9% ↑
Total Clicks 529 426 +24.2% ↑
Average Position 7.1 7.7 +0.6 positions ↑
Click-Through Rate 1.2% 1.3% -0.1%

Note on CTR

The slight CTR decrease is expected when impressions grow faster than clicks. The site is now ranking for significantly more queries across two town markets (Scarsdale + Chappaqua), which dilutes CTR but results in more total clicks and broader visibility. This is a positive indicator of expanded search presence.

New Market: Chappaqua Query Explosion

From Zero to 5,600+ Impressions for Chappaqua

Before Total Search published the Chappaqua guide, franciemalina.com had ZERO impressions for Chappaqua-related queries. In February alone, the site now ranks for 50+ Chappaqua queries with over 5,600 total impressions and 65+ clicks.

Google Analytics 4: Traffic Overview

Site-Wide Growth: +33% Active Users, +33% Sessions

Total site traffic grew significantly across all channels, driven by Paid Search growth (+45%) and continued Organic Search expansion (+22%). The site now attracts 2,247 active users per month, up from 1,686.

Metric February 2026 January 2026 Change
Active Users 2,247 1,686 +33.27% ↑
Total Sessions 2,524 1,897 +33.05% ↑
Engaged Sessions 2,240 1,703 +31.53% ↑
Engagement Rate 88.75% 89.77% -1.14%
Events 19,217 14,224 +35.1% ↑
Key Events 69 67 +2.99% ↑

Organic Search Channel Performance

Metric February 2026 January 2026 Change
Organic Sessions 527 432 +21.99% ↑
Organic Active Users 464 378 +22.75% ↑
Organic Engaged Sessions 484 399 +21.3% ↑
Engagement Rate 91.84% 92.36% -0.56%
Bounce Rate 8.16% 7.64% +6.81%
Events per Session 5.93 6.15 -3.58%
Share of Total Traffic 20.88% 22.77% Paid Search grew faster

What This Means

Organic search continues to grow in absolute volume (+22%). The slight decrease in organic share of total traffic is because Paid Search grew even faster (+44%) during the same period. The organic traffic quality remains excellent with a 91.84% engagement rate and only 8.16% bounce rate — indicating the content is attracting the right audience.

Google Organic Rankings: Live Test (March 1, 2026)

Chappaqua Guide Ranks #1 — Outranking Compass, Wikipedia, and Douglas Elliman

Live SERP testing on March 1, 2026 confirms that the Chappaqua Ultimate Guide ranks #1 for its target queries, while Scarsdale neighborhood guides hold strong positions at #3-#5. The dedicated neighborhood page strategy is validated: Quaker Ridge (#3) and Fox Meadow (#7) outperform the broad Scarsdale guide on neighborhood-specific queries.

Query Organic Position Page Ranking Key Competitors Outranked
"Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua NY" #1 Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua Compass, Homes.com, Wikipedia, Douglas Elliman
"Chappaqua NY everything you need to know" #1 Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua Compass, Nextdoor, Douglas Elliman, TripAdvisor
"Quaker Ridge Scarsdale neighborhood" #3 Quaker Ridge Neighborhood Guide Zillow, Homes.com, Niche, Scarsdale.gov
"moving to Scarsdale NY guide" #5 Ultimate Guide to Scarsdale Five Corners Properties, Niche
"Fox Meadow Scarsdale NY neighborhood" #7 Fox Meadow Neighborhood Guide —
"best neighborhoods in Scarsdale NY for families" ~#8 Ultimate Guide to Scarsdale —
"Heathcote Scarsdale NY neighborhood guide" ~#8 Ultimate Guide to Scarsdale —
"Scarsdale real estate market guide" Not ranked — Dominated by Redfin, Zillow, Rocket

Key Insight: Dedicated Pages Beat Broad Guides

Quaker Ridge (dedicated page) ranks #3. Fox Meadow (dedicated page) ranks #7. But Heathcote queries are served by the broad Scarsdale guide and rank only #8. Creating a dedicated Heathcote neighborhood page would likely push that query into the top 3-5, matching the Quaker Ridge pattern.

Consistent Competitors

The sites appearing most frequently across Scarsdale/Chappaqua queries: fivecornersproperties.com, compass.com, redfin.com, suburbanjunglegroup.com, and homes.com.

AI Search Citation Testing: March 1, 2026 Results

✅ Live Testing Completed — 36+ Perplexity Citations, 10+ ChatGPT Citations, Google AI Overview Active

All 12 queries (7 Scarsdale + 5 Chappaqua) were tested live across Perplexity AI, ChatGPT, and Google Search on March 1, 2026. The new Chappaqua guide is already being cited as a primary source across AI search platforms just weeks after publication. Perplexity AI citations grew from 32+ (Jan) to 36+ across 10/12 queries, and ChatGPT citations exploded from 8 (Jan) to 10+ per query.

Platform Summary: March 1, 2026

Platform January 2026 Baseline March 1, 2026 Live Test Change
Perplexity AI 32+ citations / 7 queries 36+ citations / 10 of 12 queries ▲ +12% citations, +5 new queries
ChatGPT 8 citations / 3 queries 10+ citations per Scarsdale query; Chappaqua citations confirmed ▲ Massive growth
Google AI Overview 4 queries cited AI Overview active with franciemalina.com cited; #2-3 organic ▲ Source panel presence
Bing Copilot 6+ citations Not testable via automation (requires login) —

# Query franciemalina Citations Jan Baseline Status

ChatGPT: Citation Highlights

ChatGPT: "best neighborhoods in Scarsdale NY for families"

franciemalina.com / scarsdalehome.com cited 10+ times across every neighborhood section (Heathcote, Fox Meadow, Quaker Ridge, Greenacres, Edgewood). ChatGPT linked directly to both scarsdalehome.com/blog/best-neighborhoods-scarsdale-ny-families and franciemalina.com/blog/fox-meadow-neighborhood-guide. This represents a massive increase from January's 8 total citations.

ChatGPT: "Ultimate Guide to Chappaqua NY"

The Francie Malina Team was cited directly as a source for commuting information (Metro-North Railroad, parking details). This confirms the new Chappaqua content has already entered ChatGPT's citation pipeline — a critical validation of the content strategy.

Google AI Overview: Citation Results

Google AI Overview: "best neighborhoods in Scarsdale NY for families"

Google AI Overview generated an answer and cited franciemalina.com as a source in the overview panel, linking to "The Ultimate Guide to Scarsdale, NY | Everything You Need to Know." Additionally, franciemalina properties rank #2 organic (scarsdalehome.com) and #3 organic (franciemalina.com) for this query.

Key Finding: Chappaqua Content Already in AI Pipeline

The Chappaqua guide was published in January 2026 and is already being cited as a primary/dominant source on Perplexity AI for 5/5 Chappaqua queries tested, and confirmed as a ChatGPT source. For "Chappaqua NY neighborhoods," franciemalina.com is the only source cited in every single section of the Perplexity response. This validates the Total Search content strategy and demonstrates the flywheel: organic rankings → AI citations → brand authority.

Strategic Recommendations

  • 1
    Replicate the Chappaqua playbook for Bronxville and Tarrytown — The data proves the formula works: comprehensive town guides instantly generate 100+ clicks and 100+ sessions. Bronxville and Tarrytown are the next logical targets given existing brand presence and listing activity in those markets.
  • 2
    Optimize Chappaqua guide titles and meta descriptions for CTR — The guide ranks position 1-4 for many Chappaqua queries but CTR remains low (0.45% - 2.49%). Improving page titles and meta descriptions for the highest-impression queries ("where is chappaqua new york" at 1,765 impressions) could significantly increase click volume.
  • 3
    Double down on "best school districts" content — Queries like "best school districts in westchester" (position 1.12) and "best school districts westchester county ny" (position 1.92) are already ranking #1-2 with zero dedicated content. A comprehensive school district comparison page could capture this high-intent family relocation traffic.
  • 4
    Create neighborhood-specific guides for Chappaqua — Following the Scarsdale model, spin off individual Chappaqua neighborhood guides to capture long-tail queries and feed the AI citation pipeline.
  • 5
    Target "tarrytown realtor" aggressively — This query dropped from 397 to 179 impressions and position worsened from 1.0 to 6.47. This is a high-value branded market query that needs attention before competitors consolidate that position.

Methodology

  • GSC data period: February 1 – February 28, 2026 vs. January 1 – January 31, 2026
  • GA4 data period: February 1 – February 28, 2026 vs. January 1 – January 31, 2026
  • Platforms analyzed: Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4
  • AI Search Citation testing: Live tests on March 1, 2026 across Perplexity AI (12 queries), ChatGPT (2 queries), Google AI Overview (1 query with AIO active)
  • Cumulative comparisons reference pre-Total Search baseline (Nov 22 – Dec 22, 2025)

Prepared by Brandon Lincoln Hendricks | Blok.co
